user.title: MQTT Broker Configuration
user.description: Configure the connection to your external MQTT broker.

data_description.broker: The hostname or IP address of your MQTT broker.
data_description.port: The port number of your MQTT broker (default: 1883).
data_description.house_id: A unique identifier for this house (used in MQTT topic prefixes).
data_description.use_tls: Enable TLS encryption for the MQTT connection.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure MQTT Broker
reconfigure.description: Update the MQTT broker connection settings.

data_description.broker: The hostname or IP address of your MQTT broker.
data_description.port: The port number of your MQTT broker (default: 1883).
data_description.house_id: A unique identifier for this house (used in MQTT topic prefixes).
data_description.use_tls: Enable TLS encryption for the MQTT connection.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the MQTT broker. Please check your settings.

abort.already_configured: This house ID is already configured.

init.title: Select Domains
init.description: Choose which entity domains to expose to the Turzi app. All entities from selected domains will be included by default.

entities.title: Fine-tune Entities
entities.description: Optionally add specific entities from domains not selected above, or exclude specific entities from the selected domains.

data_description.additional_entities: Add specific entities from domains not included in the previous step.
data_description.excluded_entities: Exclude specific entities from the domains you selected.
